meaning: n.瀹囧畽,涓栫晫,涓囩墿,棰嗗煙
examples: The universe is slowly yielding up its secrets.
The idea of a parallel universe is hard to grasp.
The clear inference is that the universe is expanding.
Regardless, listen up, BPP universe, because it's time to crack open the BPP Jukebox.
In retrospect, though, my decision was not impulsive: the universe had been giving me signs all along.
